params.isIDCard: Whether the document is an ID card (affects disclosed data format).
params.params: The proof verification parameters from ZKPassport SDK.

returns.identifier: The unique identifier of the passport.

params.account: The address of the account to check.
params.functionSelector: The function selector of the specific check to perform (e.g. CHECK_AGE or CHECK_EQUAL).
params.input: The encoded input parameters for the check (e.g. age threshold or field name and expected value).
params.staleAfterSeconds: The time in seconds after which the proof is considered stale/expired.

returns._0: verified Whether the proof verification succeeded.

register((bytes32,(bytes32,bytes,bytes32.notice: Verify a ZKPassport proof and register the identity and disclosed data.

verifyProof(address,uint256,bytes4,bytes.notice: Verify a specific proof (e.g. age over 18) for a caller's registered passport.
